testcase.name: getRoutsNotSellTest
testcase.system-out: 20:18:06.387 [main] INFO org.hibernate.cache.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator -- HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 20:18:06.424 [main] WARN org.hibernate.orm.deprecation -- FKsrb7bac0uiq5sycydgbgxxyiu Hibernate: drop table if exists DriverUser_Route Hibernate: drop table if exists ItemService Hibernate: drop table if exists Purchase Hibernate: drop table if exists Review Hibernate: drop table if exists Route Hibernate: drop table if exists Service Hibernate: drop table if exists Stop Hibernate: drop table if exists Supplier Hibernate: drop table if exists TourGuideUser_Route Hibernate: drop table if exists User Hibernate: create table DriverUser_Route ( driver_id bigint not null, route_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table ItemService ( quantity integer not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, purchase_id bigint, service_id bigint, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Purchase ( totalPrice float(23) not null, date datetime(6), id bigint not null auto_increment, route_id bigint, user_id bigint, code varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Review ( rating integer not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, purchase_id bigint, comment varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Route ( maxNumberUsers integer not null, price float(23) not null, totalKm float(23) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Service ( price float(23) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, supplier_id bigint, name varchar(100) not null, description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Stop ( id bigint not null auto_increment, route_id bigint, description varchar(255), name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Supplier ( id bigint not null auto_increment, authorizationNumber varchar(255) not null, businessName varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table TourGuideUser_Route ( route_id bigint not null, tour_guide_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table User ( active bit not null, birthdate datetime(6), id bigint not null auto_increment, TIPO_USUARIO varchar(31) not null, education varchar(255), email varchar(255), expedient varchar(255), name varchar(255), password varchar(255), phoneNumber varchar(255), username varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table Review add constraint UK_k1hayctsk7sh28pkewme2cpwh unique (purchase_id) Hibernate: alter table Supplier add constraint UK_42cyx8mhhvhl87fyh80w0q6i2 unique (authorizationNumber) Hibernate: alter table User add constraint testcase.name: getMostDemandedServiceTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name, s1_0.price, s1_0.supplier_id from Service s1_0 join ItemService is1_0 on s1_0.id=is1_0.service_id group by s1_0.id order by sum(is1_0.quantity) desc limit ? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.authorizationNumber, s1_0.businessName from Supplier s1_0 where s1_0.id=?

testcase.name: getTourGuidesWithRating1Test
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <3> but was: <0> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:145) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:531) at unlp.info.bd2.ToursQuerysTests.getTourGuidesWithRating1Test(ToursQuerysTests.java:145) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1597) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1597)
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select tgu1_0.id, tgu1_0.active, tgu1_0.birthdate, tgu1_0.email, tgu1_0.name, tgu1_0.password, tgu1_0.phoneNumber, tgu1_0.username, tgu1_0.education from User tgu1_0 join (Review r1_0 join Purchase p1_0 on p1_0.id=r1_0.purchase_id) on tgu1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where r1_0.rating=1 and tgu1_0.TIPO_USUARIO='TOUR_GUIDE'

testcase.name: getTop3RoutesWithMaxRatingTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.maxNumberUsers, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.totalKm from Route r1_0 join Purchase p1_0 on r1_0.id=p1_0.route_id join Review r3_0 on p1_0.id=r3_0.purchase_id group by r1_0.id order by avg(r3_0.rating) desc limit ?

testcase.name: getCountOfPurchasesBetweenDatesTest
